Home.howItWorksSub: 3 steps from product info to compliance report

Check.noAction: No compliance action needed at this time

Check.gaccDesc: Check if your food product needs GACC Decree 248 registration for China import.
Check.labelDesc: Verify your product label meets Chinese GB standards for food, cosmetics, and consumer goods.
Check.cccDesc: Find out if your product requires China Compulsory Certification (CCC) for import.
Check.nmpaDesc: Determine if your cosmetics or skincare products need NMPA registration or filing.
Check.crossborderDesc: Check compliance requirements for cross-border e-commerce via Tmall Global, JD Worldwide, or WeChat.
Check.trademarkDesc: Assess your trademark registration and brand protection needs in China.
Check.categoryCheckDesc: 3-second free compliance assessment for China import
Check.gaccSubtitle: Check if your food product needs GACC Decree 248 registration.
Check.cccSubtitle: Find out if your product requires China Compulsory Certification (CCC).
Check.labelSubtitle: Verify your product label meets GB 7718 and GB 28050 requirements.
Check.nmpaSubtitle: Determine if your cosmetics need NMPA registration or filing.
Check.crossborderSubtitle: Check compliance requirements for selling on Chinese e-commerce platforms.
Check.trademarkSubtitle: Assess your brand's trademark registration needs in China.
Check.productDescPlaceholder: e.g., Red wine, 13.5% ABV, Cabernet Sauvignon
Check.requiresLabelReview: ✅ Your product requires label compliance review
Check.fullReportDesc: Complete report with all required documents, timeline, and next steps.
Check.oneTimePaymentDesc: One-time payment. Report delivered via web + email.
Check.requiredFieldsError: ⚠️ Please fill in all required fields highlighted in red.
Check.targetPlatformPlaceholder: e.g., Tmall Global, JD Worldwide, Douyin
Check.cbOneLine: ✅ CBEC eligible. No GACC registration needed.
Check.cbRiskPathway: On positive list — fastest route to Chinese market.
Check.cbSummary: Cross-border e-commerce is the fastest channel for entering China.
Check.cbViability: High — CBEC is the fastest route to Chinese market
Check.gaccCat_alcohol_reject_0_solution: Pre-submission lab verification + label accuracy check
Check.gaccCat_alcohol_reject_1_solution: Full ingredient audit against GB 2760 additive list
Check.gaccCat_alcohol_riskReason: 18 categories outside — standard risk. Alcohol content and additives monitored.
Check.gaccCat_beverage_reject_0_cause: Different preservative standards vs exporting country
Check.gaccCat_beverage_reject_0_solution: Formulation review against China's positive list
Check.gaccCat_beverage_riskReason: 18 categories outside — low risk. Standard documentation applies.
Check.gaccCat_canned_reject_0_problem: Can damage or bulging at inspection
Check.gaccCat_canned_riskReason: 18 categories outside — standard risk. Shelf-stable processed products.
Check.gaccCat_coffee_tea_reject_0_cause: Different MRL standards between China and exporting country
Check.gaccCat_coffee_tea_reject_0_solution: Pre-export testing at CNAS-lab for compliance
Check.gaccCat_coffee_tea_reject_1_solution: Certificate of analysis from accredited + shipping container log
Check.gaccCat_coffee_tea_riskReason: 18 categories outside — standard risk. Roasted coffee and processed tea.
Check.gaccCat_confectionery_reject_0_cause: Products with >5% dairy content may be reclassified
Check.gaccCat_confectionery_reject_1_cause: Using additives approved in origin but banned in China
Check.gaccCat_confectionery_reject_1_solution: Full additive formula audit before application
Check.gaccCat_confectionery_riskReason: 18 categories outside — low risk. Standard GACC registration.
Check.gaccCat_dairy_reject_0_solution: Quarterly aflatoxin testing + feed source audit documentation
Check.gaccCat_dairy_reject_1_cause: Infant formula has separate CFDA registration
Check.gaccCat_dairy_reject_1_problem: Infant formula formula registration not separate
Check.gaccCat_dairy_reject_1_solution: Separate registration pathway for formula products
Check.gaccCat_dairy_riskReason: Category 18 high-risk. Strict quarantine + formula registration for infant dairy.
Check.gaccCat_grain_reject_0_cause: Live pest larvae found in shipment
Check.gaccCat_grain_reject_1_solution: Drying protocol compliance + container moisture monitoring
Check.gaccCat_grain_riskReason: Category 18 high-risk. Quarantine concerns for pests/diseases.
Check.gaccCat_health_food_reject_0_cause: Claim not on CFDA approved list
Check.gaccCat_health_food_reject_0_problem: Health food function claim not approved
Check.gaccCat_health_food_riskReason: Category 18 high-risk. Health food function claims require CFDA registration.
Check.gaccCat_honey_reject_0_solution: Transition to antibiotic-free beekeeping + certificate of analysis
Check.gaccCat_honey_reject_1_solution: Carbon isotope ratio testing + traceability documentation
Check.gaccCat_honey_riskReason: Category 18 high-risk. Antibiotic residues and heavy metals strict limits.
Check.gaccCat_meat_reject_0_problem: Country not approved for meat exports
Check.gaccCat_meat_reject_0_solution: Verify country is on GACC approved meat suppliers list
Check.gaccCat_meat_reject_1_cause: Processing plant not in GACC's overseas facility list
Check.gaccCat_meat_reject_1_solution: Pre-registration of facility with GACC (can take 6+ months)
Check.gaccCat_meat_reject_2_solution: Official veterinary certificate + country disease-free status documentation
Check.gaccCat_meat_riskReason: Category 18 high-risk. Requires overseas enterprise registration + quarantine access negotiation.
Check.gaccCat_nuts_reject_0_solution: COA from CNAS lab + container humidity control log
Check.gaccCat_nuts_riskReason: Category 18 high-risk. Aflatoxin and quarantine concerns.
Check.gaccCat_oil_reject_0_solution: Processing parameter review + activated carbon filtration
Check.gaccCat_oil_reject_1_cause: China requires GMO labeling for certain oils
Check.gaccCat_oil_reject_1_solution: GMO testing + labeling compliance per China regulations
Check.gaccCat_oil_riskReason: Category 18 high-risk. Contamination, benzopyrene and heavy metals monitored.
Check.gaccCat_other_reject_0_cause: Product does not clearly fit existing GACC categories
Check.gaccCat_other_reject_0_solution: Submit product spec for GACC pre-classification ruling
Check.gaccCat_other_riskReason: Uncategorized product. Category review with GACC recommended.
Check.gaccCat_seafood_reject_0_cause: CN-GB 2762 limits are stricter than EU/US
Check.gaccCat_seafood_reject_0_solution: Pre-shipment heavy metals screening at CNAS lab
Check.gaccCat_seafood_reject_1_cause: Bilateral fish import protocol not signed
Check.gaccCat_seafood_reject_1_solution: Check GACC aquatic products approved country list
Check.gaccCat_seafood_riskReason: Category 18 high-risk. Quarantine-sensitive. Bilateral protocol often required.
Check.gaccCat_seasoning_reject_0_cause: Mixed seasoning contains additives not per GB 2760
Check.gaccCat_seasoning_reject_0_problem: Proprietary blend additives not all approved
Check.gaccCat_seasoning_reject_0_solution: Full ingredient breakdown + additive compliance per Chinese standards
Check.gaccCat_seasoning_riskReason: Category 18 high-risk. Complex ingredient blends raise additive cross-check issues.
Check.gaccCat_sugar_reject_0_cause: China has sugar import tariff-rate quota
Check.gaccChannel_cbec_desc: Sell directly to Chinese consumers via Tmall Global, JD Worldwide, Koala. Products stored in bonded warehouses.
Check.gaccChannel_generalTrade_desc: Standard import channel for commercial sale in physical retail and wholesale.
Check.gaccChannel_generalTrade_dis3: Requires Chinese entity or authorized agent
Check.gaccChannel_parcel_adv1: No compliance needed for personal use quantities
Check.gaccChannel_parcel_desc: Direct-to-consumer via courier (FedEx, DHL). For small quantities only.
Check.gaccChannel_parcel_dis1: Strictly limited to personal use quantities
Check.gaccChannel_parcel_dis3: Customs may require commercial clearance above threshold
Check.gaccClassify_hsMatch: HS code appears consistent with product category.
Check.gaccClassify_hsMismatch: HS code may not align with the standard range. Verify classification to avoid customs delays.
Check.gaccCompetitiveAnalysis: China imported significant volumes of this category in 2024-2025. The category shows growth potential with rising consumer demand for premium imports.
Check.gaccCompetitiveAnalysisStable: China imported significant volumes of this category in 2024-2025. The category is stable with steady demand.
Check.gaccCost_brokerage_notes: Per-shipment customs clearance. Not a one-time cost.
Check.gaccCost_consultation_notes: End-to-end management: classification → documentation → filing → follow-up.
Check.gaccCost_labelDesign_notes: Includes GB 7718 compliance check, nutrition panel calculation, 2 revision rounds.
Check.gaccCost_registration_notes: CIFER system filing with professional agent handling.
Check.gaccCost_testing_notes: Required tests at CNAS-accredited lab. Costs vary by test scope.
Check.gaccCost_translation_notes: All non-Chinese documents need certified Chinese translation.
Check.gaccCountry_noRestrictions: No specific restrictions identified for this origin country.
Check.gaccDoc_authorityLetter_error: Wrong authority, format not per GACC requirements
Check.gaccDoc_authorityLetter_format: Official letter from exporting country authority
Check.gaccDoc_flowChart_error: Too generic, missing critical control points
Check.gaccDoc_freeSale_error: Wrong issuing authority, product name mismatch
Check.gaccDoc_freeSale_name: Certificate of Free Sale / Export Certificate
Check.gaccDoc_photos_error: Low resolution, doesn't show all label sides
Check.gaccDoc_productDesc_error: Additive codes not per GB 2760, missing INN numbers
Check.gaccExecutiveSummary: This comprehensive assessment evaluates the product against all applicable Chinese import regulations.
Check.gaccGb28050_1: Energy must ALWAYS be shown in kJ (kilojoules) — not kcal alone.
Check.gaccGb28050_2: Mandatory fields: Energy, Protein, Fat, Carbohydrate, Sodium.
Check.gaccGb28050_3: NRV% (Nutrient Reference Values) must be calculated for each mandatory field.
Check.gaccGb28050_4: Additional fields required when making claims (e.g., fiber, vitamins).
Check.gaccGb28050_5: Format must follow the exact table structure shown in GB 28050 appendix.
Check.gaccGb28050_6: Tolerance ranges apply: ≤120% for energy and nutrients, ≥80% for protein, fiber, vitamins.
Check.gaccGb7718_1: All text must be in Chinese. Foreign language may be supplementary but not primary.
Check.gaccGb7718_2: Font size must be no less than 1.8mm for most mandatory items.
Check.gaccGb7718_3: If product has a claimed character (e.g., 'organic', 'natural'), supporting certification required.
Check.gaccGb7718_4: Products containing GMO ingredients must be labeled as per GMO labeling regulations.
Check.gaccGb7718_6: Trans-fat content must be declared if >0.3g per 100g/100mL.
Check.gaccHorizon_aiLabel_desc: Customs is piloting AI systems for automated label compliance review. May reduce label clearance times but also increase initial rejection rates.
Check.gaccHorizon_carbon_desc: China exploring carbon footprint labeling for imported goods. Initially voluntary for food, but may become expected in premium retail channels.
Check.gaccHorizon_cbec_desc: Expected expansion of the cross-border e-commerce positive list to include more food categories, enabling more products to enter via simplified CBEC channel.
Check.gaccHorizon_gb7718_desc: The long-anticipated revision of GB 7718 (label standard) expected to introduce significant changes to labeling requirements including new allergen declaration format, font size requirements, and digital labeling options.
Check.gaccHorizon_healthFood_desc: NHC/CFDA reviewing the health food registration system. Possible streamlining of the filing vs registration classification for functional foods.
Check.gaccHorizon_traceability_desc: GACC is developing a nationwide traceability system for imported food. May require additional batch documentation and digital tracking.
Check.gaccLabel_additives_mistake: Using trade names instead of standard codes
Check.gaccLabel_additives_req: Listed with GB 2760 category codes (e.g., E330, INS 330).
Check.gaccLabel_allergen_mistake: Not declaring allergens that are regulated in China
Check.gaccLabel_allergen_req: Mandatory: milk, eggs, fish, crustacea, peanuts, soybeans, wheat, tree nuts.
Check.gaccLabel_date_mistake: Using MM/DD/YYYY format or printing in hard-to-find location
Check.gaccLabel_date_req: DD/MM/YYYY or YYYY/MM/DD format. Position must be prominent.
Check.gaccLabel_importRecord_mistake: Leaving blank or showing incorrect number
Check.gaccLabel_importRecord_req: Must show CIQ registration number after customs clearance.
Check.gaccLabel_ingredients_mistake: Missing additive code numbers or incorrect order
Check.gaccLabel_ingredients_req: Descending order by weight. All additives with GB 2760 code numbers.
Check.gaccLabel_manufacturer_req: Name and address of overseas manufacturer AND Chinese responsible party/agent.
Check.gaccLabel_netContent_mistake: Using imperial units or missing draining weight
Check.gaccLabel_netContent_req: Metric units (g/mL). Draining weight for solid-in-liquid products.
Check.gaccLabel_nutrition_mistake: Using kcal instead of kJ, or missing NRV% column
Check.gaccLabel_nutrition_req: Per GB 28050 format. Energy (kJ), protein, fat, carbs, sodium mandatory. NRV% required.
Check.gaccLabel_productName_mistake: Fanciful names without descriptive standard name
Check.gaccLabel_productName_req: Accurate reflection of product's true nature. Standardized name per GB if exists.
Check.gaccLabel_qs_mistake: Printing Chinese production license marks on imported products
Check.gaccLabel_qs_req: Not required for imported food. Do NOT print QS/SC logo.
Check.gaccLabel_storage_mistake: Generic 'store in cool dry place' when specific conditions needed
Check.gaccMarket_consumerPerception: Chinese consumers generally view imported products favorably, associating them with higher quality and safety standards. Premium positioning is achievable.
Check.gaccMarket_driver1: Rising middle class demand for premium imports
Check.gaccMarket_driver4: Young consumers' preference for international brands
Check.gaccMarket_recoHigh: Consider CBEC channel for market testing before committing to full general trade compliance.
Check.gaccMarket_recoStandard: General trade recommended for full market access. Leverage premium positioning for better margins.
Check.gaccMarket_trendDeclining: Declining — Domestic substitutes gaining market share. However, premium/branded imports still find niche demand.
Check.gaccMarket_trendGrowing: Growing demand — China's imports of this category have been increasing 8-15% year on year. Premium imported products particularly sought after by middle-class consumers.
Check.gaccMarket_trendStable: Stable — Consistent import volume with moderate growth. Established market with steady demand.
Check.gaccOneLineHigh: 🔴 Action Required: Professional compliance support strongly recommended. Expect 4-14 month timeline.
Check.gaccOneLineStandard: 🟢 Proceed: GACC registration required. Standard pathway. Estimated 2-4 months.
Check.gaccPost_annualReport_desc: Submit annual production and export data to GACC. Failure may result in registration suspension.
Check.gaccPost_clearance_desc: Each shipment requires CIQ inspection. Random sampling and testing may occur.
Check.gaccPost_formulaChange_desc: Any change in formulation, packaging, or manufacturing location must be notified to GACC.
Check.gaccPost_labelUpdate_desc: Monitor GB 7718/28050 updates. Any change in ingredient/formulation requires label revision.
Check.gaccPost_renewal_desc: Submit renewal application 3-6 months before expiry. Include updated documentation.
Check.gaccPost_surveillance_desc: SAMR conducts regular market inspections. Products may be randomly tested for compliance.
Check.gaccRiskNote_standardRiskCat: Standard risk category — outside 18 high-risk list
Check.gaccRiskPathwayHigh: High-risk classification — enhanced compliance procedures required.
Check.gaccRiskPathwayStandard: Standard risk — Standard GACC registration pathway applies.
Check.gaccSummaryHigh: Your product is classified under GACC's high-risk category. Professional compliance support is strongly recommended.
Check.gaccSummaryStandard: Your product requires GACC registration but is classified as low risk.
Check.gaccTariff_ftaEligible: Eligible — may qualify for reduced rates
Check.gaccTariff_landedCostExample: Contact us for a detailed landed cost calculation based on your FOB price.
Check.gaccTimeline_docPrep_desc: Gather all required documents, translate to Chinese, notarize where required.
Check.gaccTimeline_initAssess_desc: Confirm HS code, GACC category classification, and identify required documents.
Check.gaccTimeline_labTest_desc: Product samples sent to CNAS-accredited lab for required testing.
Check.gaccTimeline_label_desc: Design Chinese label per GB 7718/28050. Submit for compliance review.
Check.gaccTimeline_review_desc: GACC processes application. May request supplementary materials.
Check.gaccTimeline_shipment_desc: First commercial shipment. CIQ inspection at port: document check, label verification, random sampling.
Check.gaccTimeline_submit_desc: Submit registration via CIFER system with professional handling.
Check.labelOneLine: ⚠️ Chinese label compliance required. Timeline: 2-4 weeks.
Check.labelRiskPathway: Chinese label compliance required per GB 7718 and GB 28050.
Check.labelSummary: All prepackaged food imports require Chinese labels per GB 7718 and GB 28050.
Check.labelViability: High — label compliance is mandatory and cannot be bypassed
Check.tmOneLineHigh: 🔴 Urgent: file trademark before market entry
Check.tmRiskPathwayHigh: Not registered — urgent filing needed before market entry.
Check.tmRiskPathwayLow: Registered — maintain and monitor for renewal.
Check.tmSummaryHigh: Brand NOT registered in China. High risk of bad-faith squatting.
Check.gaccDetailedTimelineHigh: Based on typical GACC processing times for high-risk products in {category}, expect {timeline} from start to market entry.
Check.gaccDetailedTimelineStandard: Standard GACC registration for {category} typically takes {timeline}.
Check.gaccLabGuide: Testing must be at CNAS-accredited lab. Tests: {tests}. Cost: {cost}.
Check.tmViability: Critical — trademark registration is essential for China market entry
Check.gaccGlossary_gacc: General Administration of Customs — Oversees Decree 248/249 food import registration.
Check.gaccGlossary_cifer: China Import Food Enterprise Registration — Online portal for overseas food manufacturers.
Check.gaccGlossary_decree248: GACC regulation requiring overseas food manufacturers to register before exporting to China.
Check.gaccGlossary_cra: Compliance Review Agent — Authorized agent for GACC food registration.
Check.gaccGlossary_ciq: China Inspection and Quarantine — Inspects imported food at ports for compliance.
Check.gaccGlossary_gb7718: National food safety standard for prepackaged food labeling.
Check.gaccGlossary_gb28050: National standard for nutrition labeling — kJ + NRV%.
Check.gaccGlossary_hsCode: Harmonized System Code — Standardized product classification for tariffs.
Check.cccGlossary_ccc: China Compulsory Certification — Mandatory safety certification for specified product categories.
Check.cccGlossary_cnca: Certification and Accreditation Administration — Manages CCC certification.
Check.cccGlossary_gb4943: Safety standard for IT/AV equipment — primary CCC testing standard.
Check.cccGlossary_gb9254: EMC emission limits for multimedia equipment.
Check.cccGlossary_cbReport: IECEE CB Test Report — may reduce CCC testing scope.
Check.cccGlossary_srrc: State Radio Regulation Committee — separate approval for wireless devices.
Check.cccGlossary_factoryAudit: On-site QMS inspection required for initial CCC certification.
Check.cccGlossary_sdoc: Self-Declaration of Conformity — simplified pathway for low-risk products.
Check.labelGlossary_gb7718: National standard for prepackaged food labeling — 9 mandatory elements.
Check.labelGlossary_gb28050: National standard for nutrition labeling — kJ + NRV% format.
Check.labelGlossary_gb2760: Food additives positive list — only listed additives permitted.
Check.labelGlossary_nrv: Nutrient Reference Value % — Mandatory nutrition labeling format.
Check.labelGlossary_ciq: China Inspection and Quarantine — Inspects imported food labels.
Check.labelGlossary_foodSafetyLaw: PRC Food Safety Law — legal basis for label requirements.
Check.labelGlossary_hsCode: Harmonized System Code — Standardized product classification for tariffs.
Check.nmpaGlossary_nmpa: National Medical Products Administration — Regulates cosmetics filing.
Check.nmpaGlossary_csar: Cosmetics Supervision and Administration Regulation — Reformed cosmetics regulation in 2021.
Check.nmpaGlossary_ordinary: General cosmetics requiring notification filing (备案).
Check.nmpaGlossary_special: Products needing full registration (注册) — sunscreen, whitening, hair dye.
Check.nmpaGlossary_icsc: INCI Standard Chinese — Official Chinese ingredient name database.
Check.nmpaGlossary_chineseRP: Chinese Responsible Person — manages NMPA compliance in China.
Check.nmpaGlossary_gmp: Good Manufacturing Practice — ISO 22716, may qualify for animal testing exemption.
Check.nmpaGlossary_hsCode: Harmonized System Code — Standardized product classification for tariffs.
Check.cbGlossary_cbec: Cross-Border E-Commerce — Simplified import channel via bonded warehouses.
Check.cbGlossary_1210: Bonded warehouse model — bulk shipment to Chinese warehouses, then delivery.
Check.cbGlossary_9610: Direct shipping model — ships directly to consumer after purchase.
Check.cbGlossary_positiveList: CBEC-approved product categories eligible for simplified import.
Check.cbGlossary_3doc: Order + payment + logistics document matching for customs clearance.
Check.cbGlossary_pipl: Personal Information Protection Law — regulates cross-border data transfers.
Check.cbGlossary_tmallGlobal: Alibaba's cross-border platform — largest CBEC marketplace.
Check.cbGlossary_hsCode: Harmonized System Code — Standardized product classification for tariffs.
Check.tmGlossary_cnipa: China National Intellectual Property Administration — manages trademark registration.
Check.tmGlossary_firstToFile: China grants trademark rights to first filer, not first user.
Check.tmGlossary_niceClass: International trademark classification (1-45 classes) used by CNIPA.
Check.tmGlossary_madrid: WIPO international system — extend home registration to China.
Check.tmGlossary_customsRecordal: Register trademark with China Customs for border enforcement.
Check.tmGlossary_squatting: Bad-faith registration of foreign brands by third parties.
Check.tmGlossary_opposition: 3-month window to challenge conflicting CNIPA applications.
Check.tmGlossary_hsCode: Harmonized System Code — Standardized product classification for tariffs.
Check.phase1_gacc_1: Identify product category among 18 GACC-regulated categories
Check.phase1_gacc_4: Collect product specs and ingredient list
Check.phase1_ccc_1: Confirm product is on CCC mandatory catalog
Check.phase1_ccc_3: Prepare product specs and technical drawings
Check.phase1_ccc_4: Arrange sample shipment for type testing
Check.phase1_label_1: Collect current label artwork and packaging
Check.phase1_nmpa_1: Classify product as ordinary or special-use
Check.phase1_nmpa_3: Prepare full formulation with INCI names
Check.phase1_nmpa_4: Collect GMP certificate and test reports
Check.phase1_cb_2: Determine bonded vs. direct shipping model
Check.phase1_tm_3: Prepare brand specimen and goods list

Report.notFoundDesc: The report you are looking for could not be found.
Report.previewBanner: 🔬 Preview Mode — Sample: Stone Ground Dark Chocolate (USA)
Report.previewBannerDesc: This is a preview with sample data to demonstrate the report layout.
Report.noReportsDesc: Complete a compliance check to see your reports here.
Report.youAreOnFreePlan: You are currently on the Free plan.

Cookie.message: This site uses only essential authentication cookies. No tracking or advertising cookies are used.

Privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for SinoTrade Compliance — how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.infoText1: We only collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us through our contact forms, compliance check tools, or account registration. This may include your name, email address, company name, and product details necessary for providing our compliance assessment services.
Privacy.infoText2: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. Your data is used solely to deliver our services and improve your experience on our website.
Privacy.cookieText1: This site uses only essential authentication cookies. These cookies are necessary for the proper functioning of our compliance check tools and user account management. No tracking or advertising cookies are used.
Privacy.cookieText2: You can manage your cookie preferences through the cookie consent banner displayed on your first visit. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are required for core functionality.
Privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us:
Privacy.updateText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
